title: Lodhran Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Lodhran, with a Z-Score of +4.26. This extreme weather event has reached a critical level, scoring 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Lodhran is causing extremely high temperatures, with a Critical level warning issued. 
 The temperature is expected to remain high, with a Cooling Degree Day (CDD) of 13.9 GG, and very low humidity at 26%. 
 The wind speed is moderate, at 11.8 km/h, but this will not provide significant relief from the heat.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols to mitigate the effects of this extreme heat wave.
